history.qwen_observation: The build failed during upgrade_build_to_java21 because maven-compiler-plugin:3.8.1 lacks JDK 21 support and conflicts with --enable-preview, and jsonschema2pojo threw a ClassAlreadyExistsException during code generation.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 ensures full JDK 21 compatibility and proper handling of compiler arguments. Upgrading jsonschema2pojo-maven-plugin to 1.2.0 resolves the code generation conflict under newer JDKs. These targeted plugin bumps will unblock the Java 21 build step.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed at `upgrade_build_to_java21` because `maven-compiler-plugin` remained at version 3.8.1 despite the upgrade recipe, causing `invalid source release 17 with --enable-preview` when executed under JDK 21.
history.qwen_rationale: Explicitly setting the `maven-compiler-plugin.version` property and forcing `maven.compiler.source`/`target`/`release` to 21 via `ChangePropertyValue` ensures the build uses a JDK 21-compatible compiler plugin version and aligns the source level, resolving the preview flag conflict and allowing the migration to proceed.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed because the maven-compiler-plugin was still configured for Java 17 with --enable-preview, which conflicts with JDK 21 requirements, and jsonschema2pojo threw a ClassAlreadyExistsException due to an outdated plugin version.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 and explicitly setting compiler source/target/release properties to 21 resolves the preview feature conflict. Bumping jsonschema2pojo-maven-plugin to 1.2.1 addresses known class collision bugs. UpgradeBuildToJava21 and UpgradePluginsForJava21 will handle remaining build configuration updates safely.

history.qwen_observation: The build failed due to a jsonschema2pojo code generation collision (ClassAlreadyExistsException) and a compiler error (invalid source release 17 with --enable-preview), indicating the compiler plugin version (3.8.1) and source/target properties were not updated to Java 21.
history.qwen_rationale: Upgrading jsonschema2pojo-maven-plugin to 1.2.3 should resolve the enum generation collision. Explicitly upgrading maven-compiler-plugin to 3.13.0 and ensuring all Java version properties are set to 21 will fix the preview flag mismatch and enable proper Java 21 compilation.
